bgp_asn.description: Specifies the Border Gateway Protocol Autonomous System Number (ASN) to be used for the gateway; must be a 16-bit or 32-bit integer.

bgp_asn_extended.description: Defines the Border Gateway Protocol Autonomous System Number (ASN) for the customer gateway, must be a valid 16-bit or 32-bit ASN.

certificate_arn.description: ARN of the certificate to use for authentication, required for certificate-based VPN connections.

device_name.description: Specifies the identifier of the physical device or software appliance at the customer end of the VPN connection.

ip_address.description: Specifies the external IP address of the customer gateway device; must be a valid, public IPv4 address.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the customer gateway for organization, categorization, or identification purposes.

type.description: Specifies the type of VPN connection; must be 'ipsec.1'.
